documentationFeedback: PR description is clear and accurate. CLI --help output is well-structured. No README updates needed for internal CLI tool.
observations: Startup role reclaim not implemented — issue spec mentions it but startDaemon() has no code for it. Health tick only auto-demotes dead sessions. May be intentionally deferred.
Re-promote is idempotent — promoting an already-promoted session updates role/repo/timestamp. Good behavior but not explicitly documented.
20 pre-existing test failures in opencode-plugin package (unrelated to this PR)
